response.justification: The candidate has some relevant experience with C++ and has worked on various software development projects, but lacks direct experience in the specific industry and some of the key technologies mentioned in the job description.
strengths: Experience with C++ and other programming languages
Strong background in software development and architecture
Experience with various technologies and frameworks
concerns: Lack of direct experience in automation machinery manufacturing industry
No clear experience with cloud platform solutions or Microsoft Azure
Not directly familiar with some of the key protocols mentioned (e.g., Modbus TCP/IP, IEC 61850)
